text:
TheParis 2024 Olympic Gameshas officially wrapped up, following a closing ceremony that saw the event get a Hollywood ending.

Unlike the opening ceremony, whichtook place outside the stadiumand on the River Seine, the Games ended in the Stade deFrance– with the likes ofTom Cruise, Red Hot Chili Peppers,Billie Eilish,Snoop Doggand Dr Dre taking part in the spectacle.

And, as usual, social media users were quick to share their reactions online. From big moments likeTom Cruise’s hair-raising stuntsto awkward fumbles including aman eating noodles on stageand aTeam GB flag bearer almost tripping over, there was plenty to talk about.

One moment that caught user’s attention was Leon Marchand’s farewell.

The French Olympian was a standout star at the Games, winning four gold medals and one bronze.

So it was fitting that he brought the Paris Games to a close – but social media users saw the funny side as he carried a small Olympic torch towards the Louvre.

Notably, two people were spotted trying to hide behind a bush after accidentally appearing in shot.

Donât worryâ¦ no one saw you ð¤£ð¤£#ClosingCeremonypic.twitter.com/A6g4zq4fix

Everyone partying in the stadium meanwhile LÃ©on Marchand:#ClosingCeremony#Olympicspic.twitter.com/r2qF6siBGo

And then there was the moment when a golden figure was lowered into the stadium, which felt familiar to some viewers…

same energy#Paris2024#ClosingCeremonypic.twitter.com/1urcP5Nu8S

olympics closing ceremony is giving nativity⭐️⭐️#olympics#parisolympics2024

Oh, and this awkward dance moment:

better than me tho tbf#olympics#closingceremony#parisolympics2024

Others spared a thought for Norwegian swimmer Henrik Christiansen – aka ‘the muffin man’ – who’s TikTok reviews of the chocolate muffins in the Olympic village went viral.

muffin man had his last chocolate muffin#ClosingCeremonypic.twitter.com/Q1qiCytd6D

And, staying on the food theme, there was the aforementioned noodle moment…

This#Olympics2024Pariswas something… now look at#ClosingCeremony…guy eating noodles ð ð ðpic.twitter.com/mf2OlHrEIx

But mostly, people were in equal measures delighted and humoured by Tom Cruise’s appearance, who abseiled in to collect the Olympic flag…

âYour mission, should you choose to accept it, is to bring the Olympic flag to Los Angeles.âTom Cruise:#Paris2024Â#LA28#ClosingCeremonyÂð¸ Tom Cruise, Olympicspic.twitter.com/gkMmCUEb0P

Howâd that lady almost make out with Tom Cruise on international TV ð#ClosingCeremonypic.twitter.com/IxtmIUPdcA

France: “This was nice let’s do some art and some weird stuff to close the show and it’ll be nice”America: “STAR SPANGLED BANNER. TOM CRUISE. GUITARS. MOTORBIKES. RED HOT CHILLI PEPPERS”

How appropriate. The star of Mission Impossible paying tribute to the athletes who do the impossible.pic.twitter.com/MDnmrySLIB

There was an upside Olympic flag. That Assasin’s Creed torchbearer.Lady Gagasinging entirely in French. A big Smurf-looking guy riding a plate of food who’s apparently the ‘GreekGod of Dionysus’.

The Paris Olympics opening ceremony was ideal meme material, and social media users didn’t hold back.

It giving Hunger Games open ceremony vibes#OpeningCeremony#Paris2024pic.twitter.com/L4batwnbVr

not sure why the Olympics has an Assassin’s Creed torchbearer but I dig itpic.twitter.com/UDkFI0Kgy3

I have no idea what is going on#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/FroAViLGYk

this is so iconic!!!!!pic.twitter.com/gMy5VdQyP1

Fred Sirieix: Paris is a city of cultureParis:Absolutely batshit. Does anyone know what is going on? ð#olympics2024#olympicopeningceremonypic.twitter.com/tiLJM2vMxM

âWell, you see officer, there was this woman in silver on a white horse that was metal and was running on a riverâ¦ââGood mushrooms are they, Sir?â#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/pnp2c0i8P5

Even the athletes themselves, trundling down the Seine in their boats, weren’t safe from the meme-making.

One thing every athlete should do on the eve of the biggest physical contest of their lives is take a three hour evening boat ride in the pouring rain

Waiting for the Lib Dem team boat to come past any moment now#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/TBcw8Klbky

First time they’ve ever been on a boat that hasn’t disappeared#Olympicspic.twitter.com/CZpQBBAzAp

“And here comes the one athlete from Peru”pic.twitter.com/ocqZ2KNqcR

But soon enough, there was just one person viewers wanted to see.

Céline Dion, who has been diagnosed with stiff person syndrome, wrapped up the ceremony byperforming from under the Olympic ringsglued to the front of the Eiffel Tower.

Ninety three minutes and six thousand boats later and we’re still waiting for Celine Dion#Olympics#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/Ots8RJK0H7

For years she thought she might never perform again. For years she watched her body fail and fight against itself, stealing her voice and the control of her muscles. For years she’s been waiting for this moment.Welcome home CÃ©line ð­#Olympicsâ¯â¯â¯#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/rpmKO9VRjl

Well, what else do you expect from an Olympic Games held in France?

title: All the best memes from the Paris 2024 Olympic ceremonies | News World | Metro News
description: The 2024 Olympic opening and closing ceremonies inspired plenty of memes – from Celine Dion's appearance and Tom Cruise's stunt to the outrageous costumes.
